---
title: "VigieRAM — Rapport de surveillance génomique"
format:
  html:
    embed-resources: true
  pdf: default
---

```{python}
#| tags: [parameters]
#| echo: false

sample_id = "ERR2093255"
mykrobe_json = "../../results/ERR2093255/mykrobe/ERR2093255.json"
```

```{python}
#| echo: false
#| output: asis

import json

with open(mykrobe_json) as f:
    mdata = json.load(f)
mresult = mdata[list(mdata.keys())[0]]

genotype = mresult["phylogenetics"]["lineage"]["lineage"][0]
susc = mresult["susceptibility"]

non_antibiotic_keys = {"pST", "z66"}
abx = {k: v for k, v in susc.items() if k not in non_antibiotic_keys and not k.startswith("Inc")}

resistant = [a for a in abx if abx[a].get("predict") == "R"]
sensitive = [a for a in abx if abx[a].get("predict") == "S"]

mdr_core = ["ampicillin", "chloramphenicol", "trimethoprim", "sulfonamides"]
is_mdr = all(a in resistant for a in mdr_core)
is_xdr = is_mdr and "ciprofloxacin" in resistant and "ceftriaxone" in resistant

if is_xdr:
    niveau_fr, niveau_en = "XDR (extrêmement résistant)", "XDR (extensively drug-resistant)"
elif is_mdr:
    niveau_fr, niveau_en = "MDR (multirésistant)", "MDR (multidrug-resistant)"
else:
    niveau_fr, niveau_en = "Pas de multirésistance détectée", "No multidrug resistance detected"

print(f"## 🇫🇷 Échantillon `{sample_id}`\n")
print(f"**Génotype (lignée) :** {genotype}\n")
print(f"**Niveau de résistance global :** {niveau_fr}\n")
print("| Antibiotique | Résultat |")
print("|---|---|")
for a, r in abx.items():
    pred = r.get("predict", "NA")
    label = "🔴 Résistant" if pred == "R" else ("🟢 Sensible" if pred == "S" else "⚪ Non testé")
    print(f"| {a} | {label} |")

print("\n---\n")
print(f"## 🇬🇧 Sample `{sample_id}` (English summary)\n")
print(f"**Genotype (lineage):** {genotype}\n")
print(f"**Overall resistance level:** {niveau_en}\n")
print(f"**Resistant to:** {', '.join(resistant) if resistant else 'none detected'}\n")
print(f"**Susceptible to:** {', '.join(sensitive) if sensitive else 'none detected'}\n")
```
